aliases: Aryan Nations Sadistic Souls Motorcycle Club
description: White supremacist outlaw motorcycle club founded in 2010 by ex-KKK member Dennis McGiffen. Acts as the militant wing of Aryan Nations, with chapters across the US and several other countries. Listed as an active neo-Nazi group by the Southern Poverty Law Center since 2014.
